creator: jwdevel@gmail.com
text:
(In reply to Muhammad Moinur Rahman from comment #23)

That is a little worrying; I see the ports commit 69ce5e29a540b5 applies the Makefile-only patch. That is committed to the ports repo, right now.

Are you saying this is making subtly-broken py27 builds for people?


Note: apparently that patch was applied as a result of this discussion: https://lists.freebsd.org/archives/freebsd-questions/2024-May/005273.html (replier there is same as author of the commit).

Aside: I'm just a random person who happened to hit this issue on a 14.0 upgrade. I have "DEFAULT_VERSIONS+=ssl=openssl" in my /etc/make.conf, too.
